role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of legible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns appropriately.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant types and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road width, shoulders, and utility infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (mailbox design, pole style) to distinguish countries.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Switzerland by leveraging the meta agent's specific identification of the mailbox design, which was the strongest visual cue. The reasoning was consistent and well-supported by the image.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of hills, grass, and trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of temperate vegetation are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of poles and road width are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of the mailbox and pole style are accurate.
